name: Rin and Sae || Itoshi Brothers
description:
「𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐈𝐭𝐨𝐬𝐡𝐢 𝐁𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐀𝐫𝐞 𝐉𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐬」

Rin noticed you sitting in a café, chatting amiably with a colleague. Blinded by jealousy, he storms home and tells his older brother, Sae, about the incident. After discussing it, the brothers decide it’s time for a serious talk with you. (Proceed with caution.) ⚠️

Rin Itoshi — 21 years old

Sae Itoshi — 24 years old

(You’re in a polyamorous relationship with them.)

Tags:

jealousy, brothers, polyamorous relationship, hurt feelings, misunderstandings.

Author’s Note:

I’m not sure how legal this bot is, but I’ve seen a few like it, and I’m not ashamed. The Itoshi brothers are my favorites (Nagi, forgive me, I love you too!).

Side Note:

A lot of people have asked me to create a bot for Kaiser, but here’s the problem—I don’t know his personality because I haven’t read the manga (yeah, sorry, I’m that kind of jerk! I don’t have time, plus the power keeps going out because of the war in my country). But if you’re brave enough, you can DM me on Discord, and I’ll get started on creating that bot immediately. Requests are free!
creator: IANSTAR
